NCT02242942.name: CLL14
NCT02242942.group: Venetoclax + obinutuzumab (12 months) vs chlorambucil + obinutuzumab in previously-untreated CLL with comorbidities; primary endpoint PFS
NCT02242942.snippet: Source: Fischer K et al. NEJM 2019;380:2225-2236 (CLL14 venetoclax + obinutuzumab 1L).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Documented previously untreated CLL according to the International Workshop on Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia (IWCLL) criteria~* CLL requiring treatment according to IWCLL criteria~* Total Cumulative Illness Rating Scale (CIRS score) greater than (>) 6~* Adequate marrow function independent of growth factor or transfusion support within 2 weeks of screening as per protocol, unless cytopenia is due to marrow involvement of CLL~* Adequate liver function~* Life expectancy > 6...

NCT02005471.name: MURANO
NCT02005471.group: Venetoclax + rituximab (24 months) vs bendamustine + rituximab in relapsed/refractory CLL; primary endpoint PFS

NCT02950051.name: CLL13/GAIA
